description: Add summary field to all tool definitions in the Linear (15 tools), Jira (14 tools), and Notion (13 tools) plugins.

userStories.title: Add summary to all Linear plugin tool definitions
userStories.description: As a user, I want all 15 Linear plugin tools to have short human-readable summaries so the side panel shows concise descriptions.
acceptanceCriteria: All 15 defineTool calls in plugins/linear/src/tools/*.ts have a `summary` field
Each summary is 1 short sentence, under 80 characters
The existing `description` field is NOT changed
cd plugins/linear && npm run build passes
cd plugins/linear && npm run type-check passes
cd plugins/linear && npm run lint passes
cd plugins/linear && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
Edit all 15 files in `plugins/linear/src/tools/`. Add a `summary` field after `description` in each `defineTool({...})` call. Examples:

- `create-issue.ts`: `summary: 'Create a new issue in Linear'`
- `search-issues.ts`: `summary: 'Search and filter issues'`
- `update-issue.ts`: `summary: 'Update an existing issue'`
- `list-teams.ts`: `summary: 'List teams in the workspace'`
- `get-viewer.ts`: `summary: 'Get the current user\'s profile'`
- `list-cycles.ts`: `summary: 'List sprints for a team'`

IMPORTANT: This PRD depends on the SDK change (separate PRD) being merged first. The `summary` field must exist on `ToolDefinition` for the TypeScript compiler to accept it.

userStories.title: Add summary to all Jira plugin tool definitions
userStories.description: As a user, I want all 14 Jira plugin tools to have short human-readable summaries so the side panel shows concise descriptions.
acceptanceCriteria: All 14 defineTool calls in plugins/jira/src/tools/*.ts have a `summary` field
Each summary is 1 short sentence, under 80 characters
The existing `description` field is NOT changed
cd plugins/jira && npm run build passes
cd plugins/jira && npm run type-check passes
cd plugins/jira && npm run lint passes
cd plugins/jira && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
Edit all 14 files in `plugins/jira/src/tools/`. Examples:

- `create-issue.ts`: `summary: 'Create a new Jira issue'`
- `search-issues.ts`: `summary: 'Search issues using JQL'`
- `get-issue.ts`: `summary: 'Get details of an issue'`
- `transition-issue.ts`: `summary: 'Change an issue\'s status'`
- `add-comment.ts`: `summary: 'Add a comment to an issue'`
- `assign-issue.ts`: `summary: 'Assign or unassign an issue'`

cd plugins/notion && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
Edit all 13 files in `plugins/notion/src/tools/`. Examples:

- `create-page.ts`: `summary: 'Create a new page'`

- `search.ts`: `summary: 'Search pages and blocks'`

qualityChecks: cd plugins/linear && npm run check && cd ../jira && npm run check && cd ../notion && npm run check
